hero.headline: Stop being the family nag.
hero.subheadline: Tell Alma what you need and she delivers it to your family — at the right time, with follow-up. All from WhatsApp.
hero.subCta: No credit card. No app. Just WhatsApp.

problem.title: The Invisible Work
problem.subtitle: What nobody sees but everyone feels

stat1.label: of the mental load falls on one person

step1.title: Tell Alma
step1.description: "Tell Pedro to take out the trash at 8pm." Text or voice note. 5 seconds.

step2.title: Alma delivers it
step2.description: At the time you chose, Alma sends Pedro the message in a warm tone — not you.

step3.title: You get confirmed
step3.description: Pedro replies, Alma lets you know. If he doesn't, Alma follows up. Your morning briefing shows status.

delayedNudge.title: Delivers at the Right Time
delayedNudge.description: "Tell Pedro at 8pm to take out the trash." Alma holds it and delivers on time. You don't have to remember.

briefing.title: Briefing with Status
briefing.description: Every morning: what was delivered, who confirmed, what's still pending. All in one message.

maintenance.title: Home Maintenance
maintenance.description: Filters, plumbing, appliances — Alma knows when everything needs attention.

coordination.title: Family Coordination
coordination.description: Assign tasks, send reminders to your partner, and auto-track follow-ups.

capture.title: Automatic Follow-up
capture.description: If they don't respond, Alma follows up for you. When they confirm, you get notified. Zero effort.

whatsapp.title: Lives on WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: No downloads needed. Alma lives where you already are — on WhatsApp.

memory.title: Memory That Improves
memory.description: Alma learns your routines, preferences, and style. Every week is better than the last.

socialProof.title: Don't take our word for it
socialProof.stat1: 73% of household mental load falls on women — Harvard Business Review
socialProof.stat2: Deferring preventive maintenance causes emergencies costing 5-10x more — HomeAdvisor
socialProof.stat3: Families spend 2-10 hours weekly on logistical coordination — Angi

pricing.title: Plans
pricing.subtitle: Less than $1 a day. What a housekeeper does for $400/month.

alma.name: Alma
alma.description: For the one carrying the load

fundadoras.title: Founders 50
fundadoras.description: First 50 families get founder pricing for life

pricing.trial: 7-day free trial — no credit card required

questions.a: No. Alma is an intelligent assistant that understands context, coordinates with your family, plans preventive maintenance, and improves over time. Reminders are just a small part.

questions.q: Why WhatsApp and not an app?
questions.a: Because you already spend hours on WhatsApp. Another app means another thing to open, check, and maintain. Alma removes friction, it doesn't add it.
Absolutely. Each family has its own isolated database. We don't share information between families, and we never sell data. Your conversations are private.

questions.q: How does the free trial work?
questions.a: 7 full days with no restrictions and no credit card needed. If it's not for you, just stop talking to Alma. No charges, no hassle.

questions.q: How many people can use Alma Family?
questions.a: Up to 4 family members, each with their own WhatsApp number and personalized briefings.

questions.q: Does it connect with my calendar?
questions.a: Yes. Alma syncs with Google Calendar and Apple Calendar. But if you prefer not to connect anything, it works perfectly with just WhatsApp.

questions.q: What kind of maintenance does it cover?
questions.a: From water and air filter changes, to appliance checks, preventive plumbing, and seasonal maintenance. All based on real manufacturer data.
Yes, cancel whenever you want — no penalty, no questions asked. Your data is completely deleted within 30 days.

finalCta.headline: Stop being the one who has to say everything.
finalCta.subheadline: Join the families where Alma handles the messaging.

footer.tagline: The intelligent assistant for your home.
